species: The green rice leafhopper, Nephotettix cincticeps, is a vascular bundle feeder...
tissue: Transcripts of almost all major salivary proteins matched against many ESTs derived exclusively from the salivary gland...
sample_source: We collected N. cincticeps in an experiment paddy field of Japan International Research Center for Agriculture Sciences...
age: We collected N. cincticeps in an experiment paddy field of Japan International Research Center for Agriculture Sciences in Tsukuba, Ibaraki, Japan in 1993.
